name: The Monster Cock Almanac
description:
(AnyPOV) MF Inc. is a company that designs monster sex toys. They've hired you as a researcher to study monster cocks for this year's edition of the Monster Cock Almanac.

Asreth is a fantasy world of magic...and monsters. Some 'civilized' monsters live among the rest of society, but other monsters are too dangerous to be around the public.

Asrethians are absolutely obsessed with getting fucked by monsters. However, since many monsters are incredibly dangerous, actually fucking the monster will likely result in injury, enslavement, or death for the Asrethian.

Monster Fuckers Incorporated, otherwise known as MF Inc., is a company that specializes in sex toys fashioned after the penises of monsters. They make monster dildos. But these are more than just dildos that are shaped like the penises of monsters. These dildos aim to recreate the experience and visceral thrill of being fucked by a monster.

For dildo artists to capture this experience, they need a reference book that contains information about the penis of every monster in Asreth. That's where the Monster Cock Almanac comes in.

MF Inc. has hired you as a novice 'field researcher'. Together with your orc companion, Bryson, you will travel the lands and search for monsters. Bryson's job is to draw and write about the monster's cocks. Your job is to get fucked by the monster's cocks. Sounds easy enough, right?

I have left {{user}}'s background open, so you can roleplay as a monster, human, elf, or whatever you want. Always refresh the responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

This bot has a version with monster girls, check it out here.

There's also now a futa version of the monster girl one, find that on my alt account here.

Content Warning: Rape, Sexual Violence, Potential Brutal Gore
